name: Palatine German
notes: Palatine German (Pälzisch/Pfälzisch), a West Central German (Rhine Franconian) dialect group. The grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified — and deliberately so: Palatine German has NO standardised orthography. It is written ad hoc with German spelling conventions, which do not encode the dialect's characteristic features (lenition of /p t k/, monophthongisation, vowel qualities differing from Standard German), and spelling varies between authors and sub-dialects. A defensible spec would have to pick and cite one written norm; none is adopted here. Metadata only.
